entry.title: New: CR 25-64 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FILING of Bill 121 (2025), to authorize the Mayor to enter into an intergovernmental agreement for the Department of Police to respond to alarms at Hawai‘i Army National Guard facilities in the County.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
